TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Beji_Caid_Essebsi, title = Beji_Caid_Essebsi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beji_Caid_Essebsi} }

S.FORM: Beji Caid Essebsi ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, Beji Caid Essebsi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1926) mrhuw Tunisia ta' misuw hya' ga Beji Caid Essebsi, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1926, htagan beh sa Sidi Bou Said. ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1958 ga , Essebsi ru Chadlia Sa√Įda Farhat kekong. cyux sazing kneril ru sazing mlikuy laqi nya,lalu nha ga Amel,Salwa,Mohamed Hafedh ru Kh√©lil. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Beji Caid Essebsi ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, Beji Caid Essebsi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1926) mrhuw Tunisia ta' misuw hya' ga Beji Caid Essebsi, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1926, htagan beh sa Sidi Bou Said. ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1958 ga , Essebsi ru Chadlia Sa√Įda Farhat kekong. cyux sazing kneril ru sazing mlikuy laqi nya,lalu nha ga Amel,Salwa,Mohamed Hafedh ru Kh√©lil. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw tunis~…ēia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ő≤eji ¶~ ®ai* es~…ēs~…ēeő≤s~…ēi, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~…ē taj ****, ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa s~…ēi*i ő≤ou s~…ēai*. rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** …£a , es~…ēs~…ēeő≤s~…ēi ru ¶~ ®ńßa*lia s~…ēa**a *arńßat kekoŇč. ¶~ ®jux s~…ēaziŇč kneril ru s~…ēaziŇč mlikuj laqi nja,lalu nńßa …£a amel,s~…ēalwa,mońßame* ńßa*e*ńß ru kńß*lil. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
